_note: User tapped a button in a template or the Persistent Menu. This fires a 'messaging_postbacks' event — NOT a 'messages' event. postback.payload is the string you set when creating the button/menu item. postback.title is the button label. If the button was in a referral context (e.g. m.me link), postback.referral will also be present. Handle this event type separately from message events.
